markdown:
The Adam paper's Algorithm 1 states that good default settings include β₂ = 0.999 [1]. The Transformer paper's §5.3 states it used β₂ = 0.98 [2]. So 0.999 is Adam's recommended default, while 0.98 is the non-default value the Transformer authors chose for their experiments. The Transformer paper is not contradicting Adam; it is simply documenting its own chosen hyperparameters. Both papers are internally consistent.

Sources
[1] ADAM: A METHOD FOR STOCHASTIC OPTIMIZATION, 1 INTRODUCTION, p. 2
[2] Attention Is All You Need, 4 Why Self-Attention, p. 7
